sub_pixel_system.notes: Game uses 320×200 VGA raster graphics at 256 colors; no sub-pixel system documentation available

special_mechanics.name: spaceship_flight_physics
special_mechanics.description: Space combat simulation with first-person cockpit view. Player controls ship movement and combat in zero-gravity space environment

special_mechanics.name: jump_point_navigation
special_mechanics.description: Mechanic to jump between star systems via jump points; not traditional platformer jump

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative. Wing Commander: Privateer is a space trading and combat simulator, not a platformer. No traditional movement physics (walk speed, jump height, gravity) are documented. Game focuses on spaceship flight dynamics rather than character/platformer movement mechanics. Physics parameters related to planetary/character movement are not available in provided source material.
